title.source: Embedding Konveio PDF Documents for Collecting Feedback
title.target: Embedding Konveio PDF Documents for Collecting Feedback

description.source: Let stakeholder and users leave comments directly in embedded PDFs
description.target: Let stakeholder and users leave comments directly in embedded PDFs

body:0001.source: What is Konveio and how does it integrate with govocal?
body:0001.target: What is Konveio and how does it integrate with govocal?

body:0002.source: Konveio enables in-document commenting, allowing stakeholders to leave feedback directly within embedded PDFs.
body:0002.target: Konveio enables in-document commenting, allowing stakeholders to leave feedback directly within embedded PDFs.

body:0003.source: Integration is available as an add-on feature (not included in all plans).
body:0003.target: Integration is available as an add-on feature (not included in all plans).

body:0004.source: One Konveio PDF can be embedded per phase.
body:0004.target: One Konveio PDF can be embedded per phase.

body:0005.source: Contact your Government Success Manager to enable this feature and create a Konveio account.
body:0005.target: Contact your Government Success Manager to enable this feature and create a Konveio account.

body:0006.source: To learn more about Konveio itself, visit Konveio’s support documentation.
body:0006.target: To learn more about Konveio itself, visit Konveio’s support documentation.

body:0007.source: How to embed a Konveio document in a project phase?
body:0007.target: How to embed a Konveio document in a project phase?

body:0008.source: Upload and configure the document in Konveio
body:0008.target: Upload and configure the document in Konveio

body:0009.source: Generate the embed code from your Konveio dashboard by pressing "share"
body:0009.target: Generate the embed code from your Konveio dashboard by pressing "share"

body:0011.source: Remove the <iframe ... src=" at the start
body:0011.target: Remove the <iframe ... src=" at the start

body:0012.source: Remove everything after the URL (starting with frameborder=)
body:0012.target: Remove everything after the URL (starting with frameborder=)

body:0013.source: Result should be a clean embed link
body:0013.target: Result should be a clean embed link

body:0015.source: Go to your project in your Go Vocal platform
body:0015.target: Go to your project in your Go Vocal platform

body:0016.source: In phase settings, choose Collect feedback on a document as the participation method
body:0016.target: In phase settings, choose Collect feedback on a document as the participation method

body:0017.source: Paste your cleaned Konveio embed link in the designated field
body:0017.target: Paste your cleaned Konveio embed link in the designated field

body:0019.source: Go to the Phase access and user data tab
body:0019.target: Go to the Phase access and user data tab

body:0020.source: Define who can see or comment on the document
body:0020.target: Define who can see or comment on the document

body:0022.source: Save changes and preview the project
body:0022.target: Save changes and preview the project

body:0023.source: Make sure the document appears correctly and that comments can be added
body:0023.target: Make sure the document appears correctly and that comments can be added

body:0024.source: How to access feedback from a Konveio document?
body:0024.target: How to access feedback from a Konveio document?

body:0025.source: After the phase closes, visit your Konveio dashboard to:
body:0025.target: After the phase closes, visit your Konveio dashboard to:

body:0028.source: How to keep Konveio documents visible after the phase ends?
body:0028.target: How to keep Konveio documents visible after the phase ends?

body:0030.source: Turn on Use Content Builder for description
body:0030.target: Turn on Use Content Builder for description

body:0031.source: Use the embed widget to paste the same cleaned Konveio embed link into the description.
body:0031.target: Use the embed widget to paste the same cleaned Konveio embed link into the description.

body:0032.source: In your Konveio account settings, enable:
body:0032.target: In your Konveio account settings, enable:

body:0034.source: Save changes. Your document will now remain visible with comments but without active participation
body:0034.target: Save changes. Your document will now remain visible with comments but without active participation
